resultList.dtldesc: Presenting a well located two bedroom multistorey apartment in the fast developing residential pocket of Tellapur, Hyderabad. Situated within the expansive Aliens Space Station community, this ready to move residence offers a balanced combination of functional living spaces, modern facilities and promising surroundings. With the advantage of elevated floor placement and wide open views, this home is ideal for buyers seeking comfort, convenience and long term value in a steadily growing corridor.Property SpecificationsThe apartment offers a practical layout with an approximate area of 850 sq. ft and is positioned on the twentieth floor of a thirty storey tower. Designed for efficient urban living, the home includes two bedrooms, two bathrooms and a combined living cum dining area that provides adequate space for relaxed family time. The unit features one balcony overlooking the main road and offers pleasant forest views, bringing refreshing natural elements into the home. The kitchen is a standard layout with scope for customisation as per personal preference. The flooring is finished with vitrified tiles for durability and easy maintenance. The property is Vastu compliant and faces west, appealing to residents who value orientation preferences. Covered parking is available for added convenience and safety.FacilitiesAliens Space Station offers a range of essential and lifestyle amenities designed to support a comfortable living experience. A 24 hour water supply and 100 percent power backup ensure seamless day to day functioning. Security measures include a security guard and CCTV surveillance throughout the premises. One lift is available within the tower for ease of movement. Residents have access to a gym, swimming pool, indoor playing areas, outdoor badminton courts and more, with some amenities currently under development and expected to be operational within the next 6 to 12 months. Piped gas connectivity is available as well, adding to the overall convenience.LocalityTellapur has grown into a sought after residential hub owing to its connectivity to key employment clusters and well planned infrastructure. Essential facilities such as hospitals are located within 2 km, making healthcare easily accessible. The neighbourhood is supported by regular public transport, and daily conveniences including supermarkets, banks and ATMs can be found within close reach. The peaceful surroundings combined with ongoing development make Tellapur a promising locality for families and working professionals seeking a well connected yet calm living environment.
